one_line_value_proposition: NICE HTG764-recommended app-based cardiac rehabilitation platform from DDM Health — one of four platforms with direct CV event risk reduction evidence, DTAC passed, ORCHA 97% rated, and CE marked as a medical device.
why_it_matters_locally: HeartBuddy is a mobile app offering personalised education, exercise programmes, health tracking and psychosocial support across multiple cardiac conditions. Built on the broader Gro Health platform which is already NICE-recommended for weight management and DTAC-approved, it provides a mature technical foundation with strong assurance credentials.
target_problem_statement: Low CR uptake, limited access to personalised cardiac rehabilitation across heart failure, post-MI and AF pathways, and need for a DTAC-approved digital CR option.

nice_guidance_refs.note: Conditionally recommended — one of four platforms with direct clinical evidence

evidence_summary: One study identified by NICE evaluating HeartBuddy for cardiac rehabilitation. NICE identifies it as one of four platforms with direct clinical evidence suggesting potential reduction in secondary CV event risk. Five additional research studies reportedly underway. The broader Gro Health platform is separately NICE-recommended for weight management.
live_sites: Gro Health platform used across multiple NHS organisations for diabetes and weight management. HeartBuddy-specific deployment sites not publicly confirmed.
patients_covered_note: Gro Health platform deployed across NHS. HeartBuddy-specific cardiac rehab user numbers not publicly available.
dtac_note: Gro Health platform centrally DTAC assessed and passed — scored 100% on usability and accessibility. Refresh required.
cyber_notes: CE marked medical device. Clinical Safety Officer oversees risk management with full Hazard Log maintained. In-app contents reviewed monthly by Clinical Safety Team.
gdpr_note: DSPT compliant. Confirm data hosting and DPA terms with DDM Health.
target_patients: Adults post-MI, post-PCI, post-CABG, new HF or AF diagnosis, acute admissions for decompensated HF or uncontrolled AF.
exclusions: Initial clinical assessment by trained NHS professional required. Confirm clinical exclusion criteria with DDM Health.
onboarding_detail: Initial clinical assessment by trained NHS professional. Patient downloads app. Smartphone with app store access required.
supplier_wrap: Personalised education, exercise programmes, health tracking, dietary support, medication adherence tools, psychosocial support, lifestyle/behavioural modification content.
local_wraparound_detail: Low local effort. Initial clinical assessment required. App-based self-management with wearable device connectivity.
training_note: Information not available on specific training requirements for CR module.
monitoring_model: Symptom and activity tracking with personalised health programmes. In-app telemetry monitors engagement and health outcomes. Wellness score tracking.
monitoring_note: Self-management tool with in-app tracking. Not a continuously monitored clinical service. Clinician dashboard availability for cardiac rehab module not confirmed.
escalation_note: Standard NHS escalation routes. App includes self-management support but is not a monitored emergency service.
implementation_prerequisites: Initial clinical assessment by trained NHS professional
indicative_price_text: Information not available. Contact DDM Health for NHS pricing.
service_wrap_note: Information not available on implementation support for cardiac rehab module.
contract_note: Information not available. NICE advises considering the 3-year evidence generation period.
expected_benefit_note: NICE EAG model found cost-saving vs conventional rehabilitation. One of four platforms with direct CV event risk reduction evidence.
tariff_considerations: Model using CR service delivery costs.
roi_note: NICE EAG model found cost-saving vs conventional rehabilitation.
minimum_conditions_for_success: CR referral pathway, initial clinical assessment capacity, patients with smartphone access.
procurement_notes: Contact DDM Health for NHS procurement options.

technical_integrations.device_integration: Connects to wearable devices (smartwatches) for activity tracking

context_of_use.population: Adults post-MI, post-PCI, post-CABG, new HF or AF diagnosis
context_of_use.therapeutic_purpose: Personalised education, exercise programmes, health tracking, dietary support, medication adherence, psychosocial support
context_of_use.hcp_involvement: Minimal — self-management app with initial clinical assessment
context_of_use.nice_scope: NICE HTG764 — conditionally recommended during 3-year evidence generation period

demo_notes: Contact DDM Health for a demonstration.
source_summary: NICE HTG764, DDM Health website, ORCHA rating, DTAC certification announcement.
confidence_note: DTAC passed (refresh required). CE marked medical device. HeartBuddy-specific cardiac rehab evidence is emerging. Verify all details with DDM Health before procurement.
